desc:
Ash Heap Treasure Map #1 dig site: To find this treasure, head to AMS Testing Site in the south of Ash Heap. From there, head north, using the big red crane as your orientation. Look for a large tunnel entrance that is closed with a grid. On the slope to the left you will find the mound with the treasure.
Grid C3 (X: 1158.8, Y: 1038.1)
Submitted By MrCrazy
